raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The cup (5x5x8 cm) is within reach of the right arm and has accessible left/right sides, with enough clearance to close the claw without contacting box_2.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is securely grasped by the right end-effector and lifted clear of the tabletop, removing the obstruction in front of box_2."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table, right side of box_2",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding the cup and there is a clear, stable area on the table to the right of box_2 so the cup will not interfere with access to box_1.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is placed on the table to the right of box_2 and released; the region around the boxes is less cluttered."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "frontally",
    "Precondition": "Box_1 front face is accessible and the left end-effector can apply gentle contact without slipping; stabilization is needed because box_1’s right side is blocked by box_2, limiting grasp approach options.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is constrained against unintended sliding/rotation while a grasp is established."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Box_1’s left side is accessible; its right side is adjacent to box_2, but there is sufficient clearance to wedge both end-effectors for a two-handed lateral pinch without colliding with box_2. Claw grasp is not used because the 30 cm box exceeds the claw size limit.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is securely held by both arms (two-handed pinch/support), lifted or ready to be lifted clear of the table—task objective (pick up the darker box) achieved."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup (5x5x8 cm) is within reach of the right arm and has accessible left/right sides, with enough clearance to close the claw without contacting box_2.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is securely grasped by the right end-effector and lifted clear of the tabletop, removing the obstruction in front of box_2.

parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding the cup and there is a clear, stable area on the table to the right of box_2 so the cup will not interfere with access to box_1.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is placed on the table to the right of box_2 and released; the region around the boxes is less cluttered.

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_1 front face is accessible and the left end-effector can apply gentle contact without slipping; stabilization is needed because box_1’s right side is blocked by box_2, limiting grasp approach options.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is constrained against unintended sliding/rotation while a grasp is established.

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_1’s left side is accessible; its right side is adjacent to box_2, but there is sufficient clearance to wedge both end-effectors for a two-handed lateral pinch without colliding with box_2. Claw grasp is not used because the 30 cm box exceeds the claw size limit.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is securely held by both arms (two-handed pinch/support), lifted or ready to be lifted clear of the table—task objective (pick up the darker box) achieved.
